authors: Mike Cowburn Ulrike Klinger Anders Olof Larsson a European
raw_title: Campaigning in the Age of Platforms: A Longitudinal Analysis of German Parties & Politicians
title_en: Campaigning in the Age of Platforms: A Longitudinal Analysis of German Parties & Politicians
title_zh: 平台时代的竞选活动：德国政党与政治人物的纵向分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了德国政党和政治人物如何随着时间推移，在数字平台上开展竞选活动。它探讨了平台时代竞选策略的变化和影响。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how German political parties and politicians conduct campaigns on digital platforms over time. It explores changes and impacts of campaigning strategies in the platform era.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播与数字媒体研究，关注技术平台如何重塑政治竞选和民主参与。
research_direction_en: Political communication and digital media studies, focusing on how technological platforms reshape political campaigning and democratic participation.
